scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,cyan "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install --include=dev && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy && node src/app.js
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
